subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed, through Whom the Promised One hath arisen and the Self-Subsisting hath spoken. Sovereignty belongeth unto God, the Lord of what was and what shall be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم الذی به قام القائم و نطق القیوم الملک لله رب ما کان و ما
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @literal interpretation, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
